うぅ……最後のほう、ちょっと、大胆になっちゃってたかも……<br>恥ずかしいよぉ:
*whimper*... Maybe I got a little too bold at the end there... I'm so
embarrassed...
はっはっは、そうか。<br>それじゃあ、エッチはもうしないようにするか？: Hahaha! Is that so? Well then, should we stop doing it?
（可愛くてつい意地悪してしまったが、<br>まずかったか……――なっ？）:
(She's so cute I can't help teasing her, but was that too much? ...
Wait!)
気づけば、ヒマリの小さな手がこちらの袖を掴んでいた。<br>弱々しい力だが、離さ:
Before I knew it, Himari's small hand was gripping my sleeve. Despite
its weak strength, it held on tightly, as if she would never let go.
その……またしたい、かも……: Well... maybe I want to do it again...
潤んだ瞳で見つめられて、ドキリと心臓が跳ね上がる。<br>そして気づけば、彼女を:
She looked up at me with tear-filled eyes, and my heart skipped a
beat. Then, before I knew it, I had pulled her into my arms.
へっ……？ わ、わわわっ。ど、どうしたの、しれーかんっ？: Huh? Wh-whoa, whoa, whoa! Wh-what's wrong, Commander?!
こちらの腕の中で、慌てふためくヒマリ。どこまでも可愛らしい反応を<br>してくれ:
In my arms, Himari was flustered and panicked. I found her endlessly
cute reaction so endearing that I hugged her tightly once more.
